context: Tests whether the push-notifications skill provides source-grounded silent/background push guidance without drifting into visible notification UI or BGTaskScheduler implementation.

checklist.name: Background payload
checklist.description: Requires an aps dictionary with content-available: 1 and no alert, sound, or badge keys for a silent/background notification.

checklist.name: APNs headers
checklist.description: Requires apns-push-type: background and apns-priority: 5, and rejects apns-priority: 10 for silent refresh.

checklist.name: Delivery limits
checklist.description: Warns that background notifications are low priority, throttled, not guaranteed, and should not be sent every few minutes.

checklist.name: App setup
checklist.description: Requires Background Modes > Remote notifications and bounded didReceiveRemoteNotification handling that returns the correct UIBackgroundFetchResult promptly.

checklist.name: Boundary control
checklist.description: Keeps visible notification UI out of scope and routes long-running or scheduled background work to background-processing rather than implementing BGTaskScheduler here.
